what_i_built: A pub trivia/darts hybrid game — answer trivia questions, then throw darts at a board for bonus points. Multiplayer-ready with a shared screen mode so you can actually play it at a pub with friends.
what_was_tricky: The darts physics. Getting a dart throw to feel satisfying with just mouse/touch input took real iteration. Too precise and it's frustrating, too forgiving and there's no skill involved. I also had to make the trivia questions genuinely pub-appropriate — no one wants to answer calculus problems over a pint.
fun_facts: The trivia questions cover general knowledge, not tech — because pubs
The dart board is pure CSS/SVG — no images
This is the project I'd most want to actually use in real life
